distinctive_elements: Unused cover of original 1990 film main theme

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Total Recall (NES)
notes: Limited documentation available. George Sanger composed music for the game, with some tracks never making it into final product. The game notably includes an unused cover of the original film's main theme due to licensing restrictions. Detailed tempo, key, chord progression, and per-area SFX characteristics are not documented in available sources.
